title: oenanthe mutellina
intro: Oenanthe mutellina, also known as water avens or water parsley, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of furanocoumarins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oenanthe mutellina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Oenanthe mutellina can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
